subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and the potential synergy you've described sounds genuinely interesting.

I'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are a few slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which of these works best for you and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact details (CTO, VP of Engineering, etc.) — I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information. If it would be helpful to involve additional stakeholders on our side, we can arrange that through the meeting itself once we've had a chance to connect.

Looking forward to speaking soon!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
